overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a hooded character walking through a dark, stormy mountain landscape at night, approaching and entering a traditional shrine built into a cliff face. The footage features high-quality atmospheric lighting with blue tones and ends with the character entering the illuminated shrine interior.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon at night, flanked by tall cliff walls on both sides. A distant stone tower is visible ahead against the dark stormy sky, and the path winds through sparse vegetation.

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide mountain valley with grassy terrain replacing the canyon walls. The character passes a line of wooden fence posts while the stone tower shifts to the left side of the frame, and distant mountains become visible.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive cliff face where a traditional wooden shrine is built into the rock. A warm glowing stone lantern marks the approach, contrasting with the cool blue storm lighting, and the terrain becomes more defined with the path leading directly to the shrine archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional shrine interior with banners and ritual elements

events.description: entering the shrine building from the mountain path into the illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shrine interior, transitioning from the dark storm outside to the warm candle-lit space within. Decorative prayer banners line the walls, a circular patterned floor marks the entrance, and a figure stands near the right side as the character approaches the inner sanctuary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy mountain landscape that transitions from a claustrophobic canyon into the warm sanctuary of a cliffside shrine. It begins by following a hooded character through a narrow rocky canyon flanked by tall walls, with a distant stone tower visible under a turbulent night sky. As the path winds forward, the environment opens into a wide mountain valley where grassy terrain replaces the cliffs and the stone tower shifts to the side to reveal distant peaks. The scene then shifts toward a massive cliff face where a glowing stone lantern provides a warm contrast to the cool blue storm lighting, guiding the character toward a traditional wooden shrine. Finally, the camera moves through the shrine archway, transitioning from the dark exterior into a candle-lit interior featuring decorative prayer banners and a circular patterned floor.
